infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 22 - 24 May 2026 The team representative is required to report to the Stewards at 17:40, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team Document 67 Date 23 May 2026 Time 16:38 No / Driver 18 - Lance Stroll R

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The team representative is required to report to the Stewards at 17:40, in relation to the incident
below:
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team
Document 67
Date 23 May 2026
Time 16:38
No / Driver 18 - Lance Stroll
Reason Alleged breach of Articles B1.6.2b.i of the FIA F1 Regulations – Potential release of
Car 18 in an unsafe condition at 16:00.
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers
